title: venison curry

directions.step: Mix the cubed meat with salt in a bowl and set aside.

Add oil to a large pot over medium heat. Once hot, add curry powder and mix together with a wooden spoon. Add ginger and red pepper flakes. Cook until fragrant, then add onion. Once onions are slightly translucent, add garlic. Sauté for 30-60 seconds, then add carrots, sweet potatoes, chili paste, and cinnamon sticks. Cook another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add stock, tomato sauce, and coconut milk to the pot.

directions: In a separate pan, brown the meat in batches and add to the pot once browned.
Once all meat is added to the pot, continue to simmer for 30 minutes or until the carrots and potatoes are fork tender.

directions.step: Add bell pepper, cook for an additional 10 minutes.

notes: I used venison backstrap but lean beef also works.
